title: The Goodman Strategy (1-2-3-5): Maximize Streaks, Minimize Losses
author: Taizo
excerpt: Also known as the '1-2-3-5 law,' this strategy focuses on protecting your profit once a winning streak begins. We look at its application for 2026 Canadian players.
metaDescription: Discover how the Goodman system protects your gains. By capping your bet at 5 units, you lock in profit while still having enough power to ride the wave of a long winning streak.
content:
PROFIT PROTECTION 2026

The **Goodman System** is a favorite among professional Baccarat players in 2026 because it prioritizes **Profit Retention.** By increasing your bet size on wins (1 unit → 2 → 3 → 5) and then staying at 5 until a loss occurs, you ensure that you never give back your hard-earned winnings in a single unfortunate hand. It's the perfect balance of aggressive growth and defensive security.
